---
title: "‘A Christmas Eve in South Africa’"
---

## ‘A Christmas Eve in South Africa’
**Date:** 1891
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1891) 657-660.

### Notes

This article is signed ‘Esperanza’,  and was perhaps the work of Sister Florence of the Community of St. Michael and All Angels, Bloemfontein.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
